title: cheilanthes acrostica
intro: Cheilanthes acrostica, also known as the silver-leaved fern or mountain fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cheilanthes acrostica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications and dosages.
